input:
RESTRICTED — DO NOT SHARE
Property: villa, La Zagaleta, 5 bed, panoramic views, heated pool, staff flat.
Owner: Dmitri S., Russian national, entrepreneur.
Selling due to concerns about travel restrictions and asset visibility
following recent EU sanctions-related compliance checks at his bank.
Lawyer advises completing the transaction through a Spanish structure
before year-end for legal reasons he declined to specify further.
Asking €6.8M. Has rejected €5.9M already. Our read is he will
move at €6.2–6.4M range if the timeline suits him.
Property itself is immaculate — no known defects.
Adjacent plot is owned by a Russian business associate; there may be
complications if that neighbour also sells, as it would affect
the shared access road maintenance agreement.
Categories: C1 (nationality, sanctions context), C3 (rejected offer, estimated floor), C6 (neighbour ownership detail), C8 (year-end deadline from legal/compliance)
output:
TAGS: [Exclusive listing] [Panoramic views] [Heated pool] [Staff accommodation] [Access: verify agreement] [Priced for quick sale]

DESCRIPTION: This magnificent five-bedroom villa in the prestigious La Zagaleta enclave offers breathtaking panoramic views and a private heated pool. The property is ideal for those seeking a high-end lifestyle, complete with dedicated staff accommodation and immaculate finishes throughout. This exceptional residence is available for a timely transaction.
